name: Careerlink Co., Ltd.
summary: Careerlink Co., Ltd. provides human resource services in Japan. It offers human resource services for business process outsourcing, customer relationship management, and sales support related businesses; and general office works. The company also provides temporary staffing, recruitment, and contracting human resource services for food processing and manufacturing/processing businesses, and cleaning of buildings and hotels, etc. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
